merlin_thesis: NAS100 in strong bullish extension at 30744.6 after sustained rally from May 19 low (28663). D1 structure firmly HH/HL with 5 consecutive bullish candles, but price at 193.7% of old dealing range indicates EXTREME extension. H4 range also breached (104.5%). No Kill Zone active. Bullish trend intact but chasing at these levels is dangerous. Recommend WAIT for pullback to 30400-30500 support zone or fresh session for entry.
